validationNotes.reason: This is a code review/analysis mission per .factory/library/user-testing.md. No user-facing application to test - validation is completeness-based (module reviews completed, findings files exist with specific file references).

keyFindings: High: decode_pipeline module excessively large (~1943 lines)
Medium: Audio fully decoded into memory (potential 300+ MB)
Medium: Spin-loop with 1ms sleep when frame channel full (CPU waste)
High: Audio forwarding thread JoinHandle dropped immediately
Medium: rollback_startup cleanup order may be unsafe
Medium: enforce_health loses thread exit diagnostic info
High: Registry handle leak on autostart error path (RegCloseKey missing)
Medium: RegisterClassW return value not checked
Medium: Hotkey ID constants duplicated across files
High: No config versioning/migration mechanism for schema changes
Medium: Silent fallback to defaults on config load failure in GUI
Medium: No validation of save_directory path
